message:
fix: auto-generate nightly release notes from merged PR titles (#8788)

Add `use: github` to the GoReleaser changelog config so releases use
GitHub's auto-generated release notes (based on merged PR titles)
instead of raw commit messages. This ensures the "What's New" modal
has content for nightly and weekly releases.

Fixes #8778

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,6 +66,10 @@ checksum:
   name_template: "checksums.txt"
 
 changelog:
+  # Use GitHub's auto-generated release notes (based on merged PR titles)
+  # instead of raw commit messages. This populates the release body so the
+  # "What's New" modal has content for nightly and weekly releases.
+  use: github
   sort: asc
   filters:
     exclude:
